speaker: charlie
text: Good evening, I'm Alex Mercer. It's a beautiful Saturday night here in Queensland, and we've got some genuinely brilliant news to share with you tonight.

speaker: alice
text: And I'm Jamie, absolutely buzzing to be here! Today's been one of those days where the world just seems to be getting things right, you know?

speaker: charlie
text: Too right, Jamie. From groundbreaking discoveries about how our planet naturally fights climate change to some ripper sporting action right here in Australia, we're going to cover it all. And Sam's got the weather forecast that'll make you want to crack open a cold one on the deck.
